activity execution,issue resolution,maintenance,maintenance handling,maintenance service,maintenance support,maintenance task execution,maintenance tasks,maintenance work,responsibility,service delivery,service provision,technical support	B人員
C客戶
(B人员, C客户) represents a relationship where B人员 (personnel) provide comprehensive maintenance services to C客户 (customers). The primary responsibilities of B人员 encompass various activities including resolving maintenance issues, conducting vulnerability patching and configuration updates, performing Splunk驻点服务 (Splunk on-site service), executing authorization checks, monitoring server performance, and ensuring overall system stability. Additionally, they assist in addressing specific technical incidents such as the Splunk SH abnormal hanging incident, highlighting their role not only in general maintenance but also in troubleshooting particular problems. B人员 are dedicated to offering support through continuous updates to ensure optimal functioning of systems used by C客户. These services are delivered consistently throughout the specified period and may involve on-site presence for direct service provision.<SEP>B人员为C客户提供了Splunk驻点服务。<SEP>B人員provided maintenance services for C客戶.<SEP>B人員is responsible for providing maintenance services to C客戶.

C人員
(C人员, B客户) refers to a relationship where C人员 (the designated engineer) performs various maintenance and technical support tasks for B客户. This includes handling routine maintenance activities, addressing specific system issues such as hard disk space saturation and data synchronization problems, and providing overall technical support. Additionally, C人员 collaborates with A人员 on these maintenance efforts and receives monthly reports from Splunk to facilitate the coordination of related work.

C人员 is responsible for conducting regular maintenance tasks for B客户, ensuring that all systems are running smoothly. This role involves not only addressing immediate issues but also monitoring system health and performance continuously. Furthermore, C人员 plays a critical part in maintaining communication with other team members involved in B客户的 support, such as receiving and acting upon information provided by Splunk reports to ensure effective collaboration on ongoing projects and issue resolution.

In summary, the relationship between (C人员, B客户) is characterized by comprehensive maintenance activities that cover both routine operations and troubleshooting specific technical issues. C人员 works closely with other team members and utilizes tools like Splunk for reporting and coordination purposes to provide a robust level of support and service to B客户.<SEP>C personnel is involved in the maintenance activities for B客戶's systems.<SEP>B客戶接受來自C人員和其他工程師的維護和支持。<SEP>C人員provided technical maintenance support for B客戶, specifically addressing a Splunk Indexer Queue Full incident.<SEP>C人員also supports B客戶through various engineering tasks and maintenance activities.<SEP>C personnel resolves issues related to B客户的系统维护。<SEP>C人員provides maintenance support for B客戶.
